mapper.insert: INSERT INTO analysis_task ( task_id, bvid, video_title, user_id, status, task_type, progress, current_step, error_message, comment_fetch_mode, comment_risk_controlled, comment_fetch_retries, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{bvid}, #{title}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{taskType}, #{progress}, #{currentStep}, #{errorMessage}, #{commentFetchMode}, COALESCE(#{commentRiskControlled}, 0), COALESCE(#{commentFetchRetries}, 0), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT task_id AS taskId, bvid, video_title AS title, user_id AS userId, status, task_type AS taskType, progress, current_step AS currentStep, error_message AS errorMessage, comment_fetch_mode AS commentFetchMode, comment_risk_controlled AS commentRiskControlled, comment_fetch_retries AS commentFetchRetries, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, completed_at AS completedAt FROM analysis_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId}

SELECT task_id AS taskId, bvid, video_title AS title, user_id AS userId, status, task_type AS taskType, progress, current_step AS currentStep, error_message AS errorMessage, comment_fetch_mode AS commentFetchMode, comment_risk_controlled AS commentRiskControlled, comment_fetch_retries AS commentFetchRetries, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, completed_at AS completedAt FROM analysis_task WHERE bvid = #{bvid} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE analysis_task SET status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE analysis_task SET progress = #{progress}, current_step = #{currentStep}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT task_id AS taskId, bvid, video_title AS title, user_id AS userId, project_id AS projectId, status, task_type AS taskType, progress, current_step AS currentStep, error_message AS errorMessage, comment_fetch_mode AS commentFetchMode, comment_risk_controlled AS commentRiskControlled, comment_fetch_retries AS commentFetchRetries, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt, completed_at AS completedAt FROM analysis_task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE analysis_task SET status = 'FAILED', error_message = 'Task timeout', updated_at = NOW() WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'RUNNING') AND created_at < #{timeoutThreshold}
